arts.ttl: Everton prove point David Moyes has already made to owners in Aston Villa defeat
arts.sum: EVERTON 0-1 ASTON VILLA: England striker Ollie Watkins scored the only goal of the game at Goodison Park as David Moyes' return as manager of the Toffees saw the Merseysiders' defeated by Unai Emery's men

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins ruins David Moyes’ return as Everton boss
arts.sum: There was no dream start to the 61-year-old Scot’s homecoming to the Goodison Park dugout as Aston Villa secured victory.

arts.ttl: David Moyes comeback turns sour as Everton show the unromantic reality
arts.sum: Everton 0-1 Aston Villa: Ollie Watkins’s second-half goal was enough to ensure Moyes’s first game back as Toffees bossended in defeat

arts.ttl: 'He is very impressive': South American expert urges Arsenal to push for £30m striker who 'really bullied Vitor Reis'
arts.sum: Arsenal are currently on the lookout for a new striker this month amid a pressing need for attacking reinforcements. The Gunners currently lack an out-and-out...

arts.ttl: Report: Everton now keen to sign £7.5m forward whose agent is actually the brother of David Moyes

Jude Bellingham 'goes on house-hunting trip to view two next-door luxury £27m mansions for him and his mum', with pools, cinemas and wine cellars in David Beckham and Cristiano Ronaldo's neighbourhood
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has reportedly been on a house-hunting out trip to view two luxury £27million mansions next-door to each other in the same upmarket Madrid neighbourhood.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The reason behind VAR's cryptic three-word message to referee Robert Jones that led to controversial decision NOT to send off Bournemouth star David Brooks after he pulled Marc Cucurella by his hair
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: Supporters felt Cucurella had a chunk of his hair pulled in the process when the game was locked at 1-1 midway through the second half at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: ‘Difficult’: David Ornstein says £55m striker is more likely to sign for Arsenal in the summer
arts.sum: Arsenal are in serious need of a new striker. Arsenal have needed a striker for a long time, and they have been scouring the market...

arts.ttl: ‘A long time’: David Ornstein shares what Arsenal have been saying internally about Martin Zubimendi for ages
arts.sum: Arsenal are close to signing Martin Zubimendi from Real Sociedad. Arsenal are set to sign Zubimendi in the summer, and this is a deal that...

arts.ttl: City-bound Reis bids farewell to Palmeiras squad
arts.sum: Palmeiras have not registered Vitor Reis for the 2025 Campeonato Paulista with the teenage defender expected to join Manchester City.
